title: GSC Indexing Root Cause Audit — 881 Not Indexed Pages

404_not_found.likely_source: sitemap containing deleted pages + residual internal links
404_not_found.waste_crawl_budget: YES — Google spends resources on dead URLs
404_not_found.decision: FIX — remove from sitemap + fix internal links + recreate if valuable

noindex_tag.severity: MEDIUM — may be intentional but verify
noindex_tag.waste_crawl_budget: YES if in sitemap — confuses Google
noindex_tag.decision: AUDIT — verify intentional, remove from sitemap if present

discovered_currently_not_indexed.severity: CRITICAL — largest group, Google knows but refuses to index
url_types_expected: some real pages buried in noise
discovered_currently_not_indexed.likely_source: sitemap + internal links to low-value pages
discovered_currently_not_indexed.in_sitemap_likely: partially — sitemap has ~649 URLs but some may be these
discovered_currently_not_indexed.waste_crawl_budget: CRITICAL — Google's crawl budget going to unworthy pages
discovered_currently_not_indexed.decision: CLASSIFY — only A/B/C pages worth improving, reduce internal links to D/E/F

alternative_page_with_proper_canonical.severity: LOW-MEDIUM — canonical working but variants exist
url_types_expected: tool variants with canonical to parent
alternative_page_with_proper_canonical.likely_source: canonical tags pointing variants to parent pages
alternative_page_with_proper_canonical.decision: KEEP — canonical is working, verify no internal links point to non-canonical versions

crawled_currently_not_indexed.severity: LOW — Google crawled but chose not to index
crawled_currently_not_indexed.decision: INVESTIGATE — check quality of these 5 pages

duplicate_google_chose_different_canonic.decision: VERIFY canonical choice is correct or fix

root_cause_summary.primary_problem: 503 discovered-not-indexed pages — Google sees too many low-value pages and is reluctant to index anything
root_cause_summary.secondary_problem: 125 404s — wasting crawl budget on dead URLs, possibly in sitemap
root_cause_summary.tertiary_problem: 205 noindex pages may be in sitemap — confusing Google's indexing signals
root_cause_summary.bottom_line: QFINHUB is telling Google 'index these 1,167 pages' but 75% are low-value, dead, or intentionally blocked. Google has lost trust.

immediate_recommendations: Classify all 503 discovered-not-indexed pages into A-H categories
Verify noindex pages are NOT in sitemap
Reduce internal links to D/E/F pages
Focus crawl budget on money pages, blogs, guides, decisions
